name: Tradeify
description_short: Tradeify is a futures-only prop firm offering Growth, Select, and Lightning plans with EOD drawdown, $0 activation fees, and daily payouts processed 7 days a week.
description_long:
Tradeify is a futures-focused proprietary trading firm founded in 2022 by Brett Simba in Boca Raton, Florida. The firm offers simulated-funded accounts across three distinct program types — Growth, Select, and Lightning — giving traders flexibility in how they approach evaluation and structure their payouts. With $125M+ in total payouts reported and a Trustpilot rating of 4.7–4.8 from over 2,000 verified reviews, Tradeify has quickly earned a strong reputation among retail futures traders.

The Growth plan is a one-step evaluation with monthly subscriptions starting at $139/month for a $50K account, a 35% funded consistency rule, and 100% of the first $15K in profit kept by the trader before shifting to a 90/10 split. The Select plan introduces two payout modes: Select Daily allows payout eligibility every day (processed 7 days per week), while Select Flex triggers payouts after every 5 winning days with no daily loss limit enforced. For traders who prefer to bypass evaluation entirely, the Lightning Funded plan provides immediate simulated account access for a one-time fee starting at $349 for a $25K account — with no recurring monthly charges afterward.

Tradeify differentiates itself in several meaningful ways. There is no activation fee, saving traders $149–$249 compared to most competing firms. Drawdown is calculated end-of-day rather than trailing intraday, a critical advantage that prevents traders from being stopped out by normal intraday fluctuations. Automated trading strategies and bots are permitted with ownership verification, and there are no restrictions on trading during news events — both policies uncommon among futures prop firms.

Supported trading platforms include Tradovate (primary), NinjaTrader, TradingView, Quantower, and WealthCharts. Mobile trading is available through the Tradovate iOS and Android app. The platform includes a built-in trade journal and performance analytics dashboard. Traders who achieve five approved payouts can qualify for the Tradeify Elite program, which offers a pathway to access live CME capital.

tiers.name: Select $50K
features: Select Daily or Select Flex payout mode

tiers.name: Select $100K
features: Select Daily or Select Flex payout mode
Payout every 5 winning days up to $4K (Select Flex)

pros: $0 activation fee saves $149–$249 compared to most competitors
End-of-day drawdown calculation is far more trader-friendly than trailing intraday
Daily payouts processed 7 days a week with fast turnaround on Select Daily plan
Trading bots and automated strategies allowed with no news trading restrictions
Tradeify Elite program offers a pathway to live CME capital after 5 approved payouts
cons: Futures only — no stocks, options, forex, or crypto trading
No proprietary mobile app; mobile trading depends on Tradovate's app
Consistency rules may feel restrictive for aggressive trading styles
Frequent promotional discounts make it difficult to compare true pricing
